methods.description: Earn commission on sales you drive via a trackable link. No follower minimum — you can start today.
methods.first_step: Apply to Amazon Influencer Program (any follower count) or LTK (requires 1k+ on Instagram or TikTok). Add your link to your bio immediately.

methods.description: A brand pays you to feature their product in a photo, carousel, or short-form video.
methods.first_step: Use the Brand Collab DM template in your Templates tab. Start with small or local brands in your niche — they respond faster and are more open to micro-creators.

methods.description: An ongoing relationship with one brand — monthly content in exchange for a flat fee and product.
methods.first_step: Use the Affiliate / Ambassador Application template. Target brands you already use and can speak authentically about.

methods.description: Gaming-specific deals: peripherals (Razer, SteelSeries, HyperX), energy drinks (G Fuel, Monster), or chairs (Secretlab). Often includes free gear plus a revenue share.
methods.first_step: Apply directly to Razer Streamer Program, HyperX Creator Program, or G Fuel Sponsorship from their websites. Most accept applications at any stream size.

methods.description: Recurring income once you hit Twitch Affiliate. Viewers pay $4.99–$24.99/month to subscribe; you earn 50% (Partners can negotiate 70%).
methods.first_step: Hit the Twitch Affiliate requirements: 50 followers, 500 total minutes broadcast, 7 unique broadcast days, avg 3 concurrent viewers. Track your progress in the Twitch dashboard.

methods.description: Sell something you create once and deliver forever — presets, templates, ebooks, workout plans, art brushes. 100% margin, no brand approval needed.
methods.first_step: Pick one product you can create in a weekend (a Lightroom preset pack, a recipe PDF, a workout template). List it on Gumroad or Stan Store and put the link in your bio.

where_to_start_by_followers.0-999: You're at the beginning — affiliate marketing is your best move right now. Zero follower requirement, and it teaches you what your audience actually buys.
where_to_start_by_followers.1000-9999: You're ready for brand deals. Send 3 Brand Collab DMs this week using the template — at your stage, engagement rate matters more than follower count.
where_to_start_by_followers.10000-99999: Push for recurring ambassador deals over one-off posts. Predictable monthly income beats sporadic sponsorships.
where_to_start_by_followers.100000+: Diversify beyond brand deals. One digital product launch can outperform 6 months of sponsored posts.
